summary: Student Reflection & Poster Generator web app deployed on Internet Computer with custom domain; users are attempting to publish and access a live URL but are encountering gateway resolution errors.
known_issues: Live URL may fail to load with error 'Canister ID Not Resolved' (gateway cannot determine destination canister); may be due to domain/canister mapping, expired draft/live deployment, or network/DNS blocking ICP domains.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Academic poster template background with subtle paper texture and warm neutral palette (template-paper.dim_1600x2000.png)
- Minimal geometric academic poster background with light tan and charcoal accents (template-geo.dim_1600x2000.png)
- Photo-less campus-inspired abstract background with soft greens and off-white (template-campus.dim_1600x2000.png)
- Modern monochrome poster background with clean grid lines and beige highlights (template-grid.dim_1600x2000.png)
- App logo mark: simple bookmark + spark icon in dark charcoal on transparent background (logo-mark.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Add a user-facing “Trouble opening the app?” help entry point on the unauthenticated landing screen (AuthGate) that explains the “Canister ID Not Resolved” gateway error and provides clear troubleshooting steps in English.
Provide a built-in “Copy app link” action and display the current hostname + full origin (protocol + host) so users can share the exact published URL they are using.
Add an authenticated navigation location (e.g., in the AppLayout footer) to open the same “Trouble opening the app?” help content so signed-in users can access it too.

Ensure all generated static image assets referenced by the template catalog and branding are included in the build output under frontend/public/assets/generated and load without 404s in the published app.
